cn_title: Xbox新掌门Asha Sharma警告员工「艰难抉择」在即，但坚称Game Pass调整正在奏效
opus_summary: Xbox新任负责人Asha Sharma在内部备忘录中警告员工「艰难抉择」即将到来，微软正致力于重塑Xbox品牌以赢回核心玩家。她同时表示，去年Game Pass降价后订阅增长和留存已有好转。6月7日Showcase将展示更多计划。

paragraphs.en: Asha Sharma, the new boss of Xbox, has reportedly warned staff that "hard choices" are ahead as Microsoft works to rebuild its gaming brand in the eyes of core fans while growing revenue.
paragraphs.cn: 据报道，Xbox新任负责人Asha Sharma警告员工「艰难抉择」即将到来——微软正在努力重塑其游戏品牌以赢回核心粉丝的心，同时推动营收增长。

paragraphs.en: Sharma, who replaced Phil Spencer as boss of Xbox earlier this year, has spent her first few months in the job making a number of significant changes as Microsoft works to win back the hearts and minds of its core gaming fans.
paragraphs.cn: Sharma于今年早些时候接替Phil Spencer执掌Xbox，上任头几个月就做出了多项重大调整，力求为微软赢回核心游戏粉丝的心。

paragraphs.en: Among them was the end of the controversial 'This is an Xbox' marketing campaign, as well as quickfire new Xbox console features.
paragraphs.cn: 其中包括终结了备受争议的「This is an Xbox」营销活动，以及快速推出新的Xbox主机功能。

paragraphs.en: The Verge reported on an internal memo sent to Xbox staff that discussed the recent efforts to rebrand Xbox (officially it's XBOX now, not Xbox). And in doing so said Microsoft would be more "deliberate" in what it's doing in gaming.
paragraphs.cn: The Verge报道了一份发给Xbox员工的内部备忘录，讨论了近期将Xbox更名为XBOX的品牌重塑工作。备忘录表示微软将在游戏领域的行动上更加「深思熟虑」。

paragraphs.en: "We are building a stronger XBOX," Sharma reportedly said. "That means making hard choices about what we build, where we invest, and what kind of company we need to be going forward. That is part of what you are starting to see in the shift from Xbox to XBOX. It reflects a decision to be deliberate in how we show up for the players who care most about this brand."
paragraphs.cn: 「我们正在打造一个更强大的XBOX，」Sharma据称表示，「这意味着要在我们做什么、在哪里投资、以及未来要成为什么样的公司这些问题上做出艰难抉择。这正是你们开始看到的从Xbox到XBOX转变的一部分。它反映了一个决定：在面对最关心这个品牌的玩家时，我们要深思熟虑。」

paragraphs.en: But what does this mean, exactly? It seems unlikely that it signals a reversal in Microsoft's next-gen console push, given the company talked about Project Helix as recently as earlier in May. To me, it sounds more like Microsoft is thinking about making difficult decisions on video games it's building and the studios making them.
paragraphs.cn: 但这到底意味着什么？考虑到微软在5月初还在谈论Project Helix，这不太可能意味着逆转下一代主机的推进。在我看来，这更像是微软在考虑对正在开发的游戏和制作工作室做出艰难决定。

paragraphs.en: Could those "hard choices" have to do with cancelations?
paragraphs.cn: 那些「艰难抉择」会不会涉及项目取消？

paragraphs.en: Whatever the case, Sharma insisted that recent changes to Xbox Game Pass have moved the needle. Microsoft cut the price of the subscription after raising it last year, and stripped out Call of Duty as a day-one launch title, instead adding in new Call of Duty games, such as this year's Modern Warfare 4, 12 months later.
paragraphs.cn: 无论如何，Sharma坚称Xbox Game Pass近期的调整已经见效。微软在去年涨价后又下调了订阅费，并取消了《使命召唤》首日入库的策略，改为在新《使命召唤》（如今年的《现代战争4》）发售12个月后再加入。

paragraphs.en: "Growth slowed down and subscriber loss accelerated after the pricing and SKU changes last year," Sharma said. "Since our price reduction we have seen acquisitions grow and retention improve, which is a good first step."
paragraphs.cn: 「去年调价和SKU变更后，增长放缓、流失加速，」Sharma说，「自从我们降价以来，新增订阅在增长，留存也在改善，这是一个好的开始。」

paragraphs.en: Microsoft is set to reveal what's coming next from Xbox at the Xbox Games Showcase on June 7. There we will get a look at Gears of War: E-Day, the DMZ mode in Modern Warfare 4, and hopefully a lot more.
paragraphs.cn: 微软将于6月7日的Xbox Games Showcase上揭示Xbox的下一步计划。届时我们将看到《战争机器：事变日》、《现代战争4》的DMZ模式，以及更多期待的内容。

subtitle: 新官上任三把火
en_title: New Xbox Boss Asham Sharma Reportedly Warns Staff 'Hard Choices' Are Ahead, but Insists Recent Game Pass Changes Are Helping
